productName: Heavenly Buds - Frosin - Papaya Melonz #7 DOH - 1g
description: This hybrid rosin is the connoisseur's clean dab: Papaya Melonz #7 coaxed into honey-gold oil by heat and pressure alone, with nothing washed out and nothing added in. Golden, terpy, and gentle on the lungs — a light, refreshing melon flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
